favourites.empty-friend: {{firstname}} does not have any events in their favorites.

noselected.text: Tap the heart to save events to your favorites.

favourites.title: Your Favorites

contribution.message:
Your support allows us to make our work relevant and accessible to all while actively contributing to building an orchestra that thrives on diversity.

We look forward to seeing you at the orchestra soon!

finished-order.header: Thanks for your purchase. We hope you have a great time!

slide1.text1: Browse The Cleveland Orchestra's full concert calendar. Discover featured programs, special events, and artist details - all in one place.
slide1.title: Explore upcoming performances

slide2.text1: Secure your seats in just a few taps. Select your own seat, review pricing, and check out seamlessly right from your phone.
slide2.title: Quickly purchase tickets on the go

slide3.text1: Add tickets to your phone's wallet for quick access at the door, complete with seat info and easy sharing options.
slide3.title: Your tickets, always with you

acknowledgement.WHEELCHAIR: I acknowledge that this space is wheelchair accessible only.

description.WHEELCHAIR: This space is reserved for patrons using wheelchairs and does not have a fixed seat.
